mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, avatar_url, last_avatar_object_key, nickname, mobile, bio, github, twitter, website, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER(#{account}) OR LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{account}) LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, email, password, avatar_url, last_avatar_object_key, nickname, mobile, bio, github, twitter, website, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER(#{username}) LIMIT 1
